start.title: 🤖 Welcome to DLBot!
start.description:
I'm a professional download bot for:
• 🎥 YouTube
• 📸 Instagram
• 🐦 Twitter

Press the button below to start!

help.title: 📖 Available Commands
help.commands:
/start - Start
/help - Help
/download - Download Video
/profile - Show Profile
/settings - Settings
/admin - Admin Panel (Admin only)

download.title: 📥 Download Video
download.description: Which platform do you want to download from?

guide.title: 📚 User Guide
guide.user_guide:
**User Guide:**

1️⃣ Press 'Download Video'
2️⃣ Select platform (YouTube, Instagram, Twitter)
3️⃣ Send the video link
4️⃣ Wait for download
5️⃣ Video will be sent to you

⚠️ Note: Only download public videos.
guide.admin_guide:
**Admin Guide:**

/admin - Enter panel
- 📊 Stats: View statistics
- 📢 Broadcast: Send message
- 👥 Users: Manage users

about.title: ℹ️ About DLBot
about.description: Professional bot for downloading videos and content from various platforms.
about.features:
✨ Features:
• Download from YouTube, Instagram, Twitter
• Fast speed
• High quality
• Easy interface
• Admin panel
